name: banyandb-bydbql
description: Generate, validate, and execute read-only BanyanDB BydbQL for SkyWalking data.

interface.longDescription: Translate natural language into read-only BanyanDB BydbQL for SkyWalking metrics, logs, traces, and properties with live schema discovery and syntax validation.
defaultPrompt: Generate a BydbQL query for recent BanyanDB metrics.
Query recent SkyWalking trace records with BydbQL.
